one_time_description: Gain on disposal of portfolio investment in Birdtail Oakland Limited Partnership
economic_notes: First Nation operates a general store and gas bar on reserve. Has consolidated multiple corporations and limited partnerships including construction, enterprises, cattle ranch, and cannabis-related entities. Gaming centre developed in Foxwarren, Manitoba.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024 as template default. Province is Manitoba (MB). 11 consolidated subsidiaries including corporations and limited partnerships. Notes payable of $633,409 includes amounts in default. First Nation is not in compliance with CMHC replacement reserve requirements. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline. Due to ISC balance of $343,926 recorded as liability. Loss on sale of land ($27,426) and gain on portfolio investment disposal ($30,581) recorded as other items. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($10,171,279) plus CMHC ($124,715) = $10,295,994. OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only ($117,172); notes payable repayments were $109,210 additional. Amortization per statement of changes in net debt is $849,824 but Schedule 1 shows $630,146 for non-house assets — full amount used from statement. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
High ISC dependency (79.24%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
